signing.user_warning: Windows may show a Microsoft Defender SmartScreen or unknown-publisher warning because this beta bundle is not trusted-signed yet. Distribute only through the gated beta cabinet.

safe_claims: The Windows beta shell uses the desktop FFI runtime lane.
The local release build bundles libcore.dll next to the Flutter runner.
Local packaging produces an unsigned beta installer EXE and portable ZIP; share only through gated beta access with the SmartScreen warning above.
blocked_on: trusted Windows signing material is not wired into this lane
trusted installer signing is not implemented
public download hosting and product cutover remain external
